title: Driving test and theory test data: passenger carrying vehicles (PCV)
body: " PCV theory test data for Great Britain  Data updated quarterly  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT411A  PCV theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain\t  (ODS, 21.6 KB)   DRT411B  PCV theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter, financial year and gender: Great Britain\t  (ODS, 128 KB)     Data updated annually  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT411C  PCV theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial year, gender and age: Great Britain\t  (ODS, 246 KB)      PCV theory test data by test centre  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT412A  PCV theory test pass rates: test centres  (ODS, 413 KB)      PCV driving test data for Great Britain  Data updated quarterly  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT421A  PCV driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain\t  (ODS, 20.4 KB)   DRT421B  PCV driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter, financial year and gender: Great Britain  (ODS, 64.8 KB)     Data updated annually  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025     Table reference File name     DRT421C  PCV driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial year, gender and age: Great Britain   (ODS, 87 KB)      PCV driving test data by test centre  These data tables are updated annually. They were last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT422A  PCV off-road exercises test by gender: test centres  (ODS, 20.5 KB)   DRT422B  PCV on-road driving test by gender: test centres  (ODS, 158 KB)     Changes to how this data is published  This data is now all published by the Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA). Before 2025, data for Great Britain overall was published by DfT.  You can view archived versions of the data as it was published by DfT in the National Archives.  View data in the National Archives.  Data you cannot find  Data you cannot find might have been published as a response to an Freedom of Information (FOI) request.  Send an FOI request to DVSA if you still cannot find the information you need.  By law, DVSA cannot send you information that’s part of an official statistic that has not yet been published.   Freedom of Information requests   Freedom of Information RequestsDVSA, 1 Unity SquareNottinghamNG2 1AY      Contact form https://www.smartsurve...        Help with the data  The driving test, theory test and driving instructor statistics information gives details about the data sources and how the tests work.  Contact DVSA to get help with published data.   DVSA management information team mids@dvsa.gov.uk   Contact the...
